senses.gloss: passive participle of دَعَا (daʕā).; named, called

examples.english: This is the man named Sayf.

examples.text: الضُّيُوفُ مَدْعُوُّونَ لِتَنَاوُلِ ٱلطَّعَامِ فِي مُخْتَلِفِ ٱلْمَقَاهِي وَٱلْمَطَاعِمِ.
examples.english: Guests are invited to dine in various cafes and restaurants.
We sent an email to all invitees

etymology.text: Derived from the passive participle of دَعَا (daʕā, “to call”).
